creator: santhosh.raju@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Kubilay Kocak from comment #4)

Apologies for cramming in multiple updates here. Since you mentioned about separating version updates from bug fixes like the build failure. This specific version update does address a security issue in cliqz-1.28.1 (based on Firefox 68.0.1) 

https://www.mozilla.org/en-US/security/advisories/mfsa2019-24/

This has been fixed in cliqz-1.28.2 (now based on Firefox 68.0.2), which is why I thought of putting it together with the build breakage fix here.

Hopefully this is not too much of a problem. Do let me know if you want me to separate out this ticket into multiple ones.
